package.name: kuka_eki_bridge
package.description: EKI (EthernetKRL 6.1) management-channel bridge for the KUKA KR C5 / iiQKA.OS2 (spec sections 5.2, 6.2, 6.4): XML command/state codec, TCP stream splitting, seq/ack request-response session, the /kuka/eki/* service surface, and a KRC-side mock for offline closed-loop tests. Never used for per-cycle control.
